description:
Saves a machine learning model as part of a batch job.

The model will be accompanied by a separate STAC Item that implements the [mlm-model extension](https://github.com/stac-extensions/mlm).

If `tuning_results.json` is present in the job directory (e.g. after `ml_tune_grid` or `ml_tune_random` in the same job), it is copied alongside the model and registered as an additional STAC asset with role `data`. That asset is ordinary STAC metadata and is not defined by the MLM extension.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data to store as a machine learning model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A distinct name of the model.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Additional parameters to create the file(s).

returns.description: Returns `false` if the process failed to store the model, `true` otherwise.
